heroHeadline: Stagflation Trap: Moody's Recession Odds Near 50%, 10Y Yield at 4.46%, Michigan Sentiment 53.3 — Fed Boxed In by Oil-Inflation Shock
heroSubtitle: Five-week S&P 500 losing streak (longest since 2022) reflects converging risks: Iran-conflict oil surge (+49%), Section 122 tariff pass-through, China retaliatory trade investigations (Mar 27), and EU Parliament advancing Turnberry deal 417-154 (Mar 26). Bond markets price 50% Fed hike odds by October.
footerNote: Data sourced from IMF WEO, BIS, Federal Reserve FOMC, ECB Governing Council, BEA, BLS, World Bank, Tax Foundation, Conference Board, Penn Wharton Budget Model, Yale Budget Lab, University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers
